title: Customize font in emails

posts.author: Damaris (Damaris Knaak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
while sending emails through monday.com with the emails & activities app is a great feature, our company would love to customize the font of the email text to our Corporate Identity’s choice.
So far it is only possible to format colour, bold or italic and underlining, so we’d really appreciate to also find different fonts to choose from. Thanks!

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Damaris,
you can create email templates easily with the EasyMails app. Just drag and drop to design them the way you want, matching your brand. It works with Gmail and Outlook, allowing you to send emails from your account.

posts.author: Darryl1 (Darryl Foster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

would definitely be a useful feature to have.
